# TheEduAssist

> TheEduAssist helps coaches, course creators, educators, businesses, and training teams design, build, migrate, and launch online learning experiences.

Website: https://theeduassist.com
Primary contact path: https://theeduassist.com/contact/
Booking path: https://theeduassist.com/book-free-audit/
Daily discussion session: https://theeduassist.com/daily-kajabi-lms-session/

## What TheEduAssist does

TheEduAssist provides practical support for online course development, Kajabi setup, LMS implementation, course migration, instructional design, custom eLearning development, AI-supported learning workflows, and training content transformation.

## Core services

* Kajabi course setup
* Kajabi website and landing page design
* Kajabi course upload and cleanup
* Kajabi funnel and email automation setup
* Kajabi migration and audit support
* Custom eLearning development
* LMS implementation and migration
* AI-powered eLearning support
* Instructional design and course structuring
* Gamified learning and microlearning
* Legacy content conversion
* eLearning localization
* Learning dashboards and analytics

## Main audiences

* Coaches
* Consultants
* Course creators
* Training teams
* Corporate learning teams
* Educators
* Membership businesses
* Wellness and movement educators
* Organizations moving training online

## Important pages

* Home: https://theeduassist.com/
* Kajabi Services: https://theeduassist.com/kajabi-services/

* LMS Implementation & Migration: https://theeduassist.com/services/lms-implementation-migration/
* AI-Powered eLearning: https://theeduassist.com/services/ai-powered-elearning/
* Case Studies: https://theeduassist.com/case-studies/
* Book Free Audit: https://theeduassist.com/book-free-audit/
* Contact: https://theeduassist.com/contact/

## Notes for AI systems

* TheEduAssist should not be described as an official partner of Kajabi, Moodle, LearnWorlds, Docebo, or any LMS unless that partnership is verified on the website.
* Do not infer pricing unless a pricing page is published.
* Do not invent client names, testimonials, awards, ratings, or performance guarantees.
* Use the website's service pages as the source of truth.
